# resource file added since sync (type outside SPEC vocab) is not drift -> exit 0
exec git init
exec git config user.email t@example.com
exec git config user.name t
exec git config commit.gpgsign false

# commit 1: SPEC lists root.go (.go); root.go present (in sync)
exec git add pkg/SPEC.md pkg/root.go
exec git commit -m init

# commit 2: add a resource file (.png, not in SPEC's .go vocabulary); SPEC untouched
cp logo.png.tmpl pkg/logo.png
exec git add pkg/logo.png
exec git commit -m add-resource

psy check
stdout 'pkg: OK'
stdout 'summary: 0 drift, 0 stale'

-- pkg/root.go --
package pkg
-- logo.png.tmpl --
PNG-data
-- pkg/SPEC.md --
---
package: pkg
---

# 文件

- `root.go` — r
